rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core outcome is purchase avoidance/deferral, and it explicitly states it extends prior work on purchase avoidance and constraints, which aligns closely with the cited paper’s central contribution on response-mode effects in choice deferral (buy/no-buy vs brand choice).
